org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.Serialization

    FutureAdapter was in dubbo-rpc-dubbo module, considering some users will use this class directly, keep the package not changed.

    • org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.protobuf.support中Serialization的使用

      实现Serialization的org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.protobuf.support中的类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      class  GenericProtobufJsonSerialization
      This serialization is use for google protobuf generic reference.
      class  GenericProtobufSerialization
      Currently, the Dubbo protocol / framework data, such as attachments, event data, etc., depends on business layer serialization protocol to do serialization before transmitted.

      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static byte[] CodecSupport.getNullBytesOf(Serialization s)
      Get the null object serialize result byte[] of Serialization from the cache, if not, generate it first.
